command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== GIT STATE vm-claude-hub ==='
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git log --oneline -4
git status --short | head -10
git tag | grep -E 'amendment|rollback|constitution|wave' | tail -5

echo '=== GIT STATE vm-memory ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git log --oneline -4
git status --short | head -10
git remote -v | head -2
' 2>&1

echo '=== ACTIVE JOB STATUS ==='
JOB="job-20260625T141723Z-abe6d29f"
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'$JOB','origin':'handoff','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo '=== DELEGATOR BINARY ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
ls -la /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate
sha256sum /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate
sha256sum /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json
cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("version:",d.get("version"))
print("3090 timeout:",d["workers"]["primary"]["timeout_seconds"])
print("3060 timeout:",d["workers"]["auxiliary"]["timeout_seconds"])
"
' 2>&1

echo '=== CORE.PY MODIFIED ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
sha256sum /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/core.py
ls /home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub/
' 2>&1

echo '=== TASK RECORDS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'ls /home/jose/moreno-tasks/intake/ 2>/dev/null' 2>&1

echo '=== OLLAMA STATE ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print('3090:',m['name']) for m in d.get('models',[])] or print('3090: idle')"
curl -s http://192.168.0.106:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print('3060:',m['name']) for m in d.get('models',[])] or print('3060: idle')"

echo '=== RUNNER PROCESS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "pgrep -a -f 'moreno-delegate.*_run' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no runner'" 2>&1

echo DONE_1977
